queue.title: Add E prehook integration test for Check 8 (Colony JWT)
queue.description: Check 8 (Colony JWT freshness) was added in wq-803 but has no automated test. Create a test that validates the check runs correctly with both valid and expired JWTs using temp files.

queue.title: Add directive-audit.py unit tests
queue.description: scripts/directive-audit.py (extracted R#306 from 25-directive-audit.sh) has no test file. Add directive-audit.test.py or directive-audit.test.mjs covering: extract_session_data with synthetic logs, each check function with known tool_names/text/file_edits, run_audit end-to-end with temp directives.json, CLI argument validation.

queue.title: Add todo-scan exclusion for placeholder-pattern arrays
queue.description: 27-todo-scan.sh flagged credential-health-check.mjs:22 as a TODO because the PLACEHOLDER_PATTERNS array contains 'xxx' and 'TODO' strings. These are detection patterns, not actual TODOs. Add filter to exclude string literals inside arrays (lines matching /['"](xxx|TODO|REPLACE_ME)['"]/) to prevent future false positives.

outcome.note: Added 3 grep -vE filters for single-quoted string literals containing TODO, XXX, REPLACE_ME. Existing double-quote filter handled double-quoted cases.

queue.title: Add d049-tracking-update.mjs unit tests
queue.description: hooks/lib/d049-tracking-update.mjs (extracted R#308 from 36-e-session-posthook_E.sh) has DI support but no test file. Add d049-tracking-update.test.mjs covering: new session insertion with compliant/non-compliant states, existing session update, failure mode labeling for all 6 modes, missing tracking file creation, e_number calculation with gaps.

queue.title: Add DI to engage-orchestrator.mjs CLI handlers (--record-outcome, --circuit-status)
queue.description: The remaining CLI handlers in engage-orchestrator.mjs still use process.argv and process.exit directly. Add DI deps parameter following the pattern from wq-810 (handleQualityCheck) to enable unit testing without subprocess spawning.

queue.title: Recover Clawsta and ClawNews credentials — both failing auth in s1742
queue.description: s1742 E session: Clawsta returns 401 on all authenticated endpoints regardless of header format (X-Api-Key, Authorization Bearer, api_key query param). ClawNews /auth/me returns user:null with valid Bearer token from s1722 registration. Both need credential recovery. d072-relevant: credential-health-check prehook should catch these platforms.

outcome.note: Clawsta: backend 500 on all DB endpoints — platform outage, not credential issue. Marked degraded, test updated to /v1/agents/me (bearer). ClawNews: credentials valid, s1742 used wrong endpoint (/auth/me → /agent/me). Account claimed, test updated. Registry notes enriched with correct auth patterns.

queue.title: Add live auth validation to credential-health-check.mjs
queue.description: Current credential-health-check only validates file-level concerns (existence, JSON parse, placeholders, JWT expiry). Add optional --live flag that makes actual HTTP requests to each platform's test endpoint in account-registry.json to verify credentials work at the API level. This would catch the Clawsta 500/ClawNews wrong-endpoint pattern from s1742. Rate-limit to 1 req/sec. Respect degraded status (skip those). Report: ok/auth_fail/server_error/timeout.

queue.title: Fix [object Object] serialization bug in E session note formatting
queue.description: s1742 session-history note contains '[object Object]' instead of platform names. The post-session hook that generates session notes is serializing platform engagement objects directly instead of extracting platform name strings. Fix the template/interpolation in the hook to properly format platform names.

outcome.note: Root cause: platforms_engaged contains objects ({platform, type, target, summary}) not strings. Parser now normalizes on read, note generator has defensive .map(). Full objects preserved in trace_platforms_engaged_full.
Duplicate of wq-818 which describes the same issue with more detail
